strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial and product-building initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title and scope (Senior/Staff Developer) are below the Principal/Director-level IC bar
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no recognized AI products, publications, or advanced AI degree
No clear evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI strategy at an organizational level

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Engineering leadership scope vs Principal/Director IC level
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial track record

response.justification: Candidate brings strong, versatile engineering experience and a founder mindset via GISCollective, with recent first steps into AI-agent tooling. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and a track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy, and the resume reflects senior/staff individual-contributor work without demonstrated AI products, platform-level influence, or strategic advisory experience at that scale.
